heading: Equipment: bakeries, schools, kitchens, and mess halls
label: 9536 Equipment: bakeries, schools, kitchens, and mess halls
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)953610:1334.(1st proviso under “Quartermaster’s De- partment”), .June 13, 1890, ch. 42326 Stat. 152The words “Money necessary * * * may be spent” are substituted for the words “There may be expended * * * the amounts required”. The word “bakeries” is substituted for the words “bake house to carry on post bakeries”. The words “each and all” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “the Air Force” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 116–283

children.text: Furniture, textbooks, paper, and equipment for air base schools.
Tableware and mess furniture for kitchens and mess halls.
